Column J Labor Rate is dynamically linked to the Field Technician Standard Billing Rate on the Hourly Labor Rates tab. Any change to the Field Technician base rate or burden and billing multipliers on the labor rate sheet will automatically recalculate the labor rate applied to all consumable and shop supply line items. Do not manually edit column J values as they will be overwritten by the linked formula.
